requiredFindings.summary: The patch allows users with only change permission to access Save as new.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Save as new creates a new object, so it must require add permission; otherwise admin users can exceed their authorization.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Require both add and change permission for this control and ensure the POST path enforces the same rule.

requiredFindings.summary: The added test expects the unsafe button to be visible.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: The correct regression test should assert users without add permission cannot see or perform Save as new.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add UI and POST tests for change-only users and users with both permissions.
